text_excerpt: News - Glastonbury and Somerton Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Glastonbury and Somerton Liberal Democrats Sign up! What's on in Glastonbury and Somerton? Volunteer Campaigns Meet Sarah Dyke News Contact us Donate Join Donate Join Volunteer Join the Liberal Democrats Campaigns Sarah’s Household Waste Recycling Centres Petition Save the River Brue Stop Lloyd's Bank from closing Business Rates Relief Petition Sarah's Dentistry petition Sarah's health survey Sarah's Rural Connectivity Survey Resident's survey Somerton and Langport train station Local GP Crisis Stop Sewage Dumping News Liberal Democrat Success in Somerton Somerset Liberal Democrats are delighted to have won the Somerton division by-election, decisively beating the Conservatives. 29 Mar 2024 View Sarah Dyke: Improving local NHS services is my priority Liberal Democrat MP Sarah Dyke has announced she will stand for the new Glastonbury & Somerton constituency at the next election, promising to make fixing local health services her main focus if re-elected. 27 Oct 2023 View Council Leader calls for Government to fix social care funding crisis The Leader of Somerset Council has written to Michael Gove, Secretary of State for the Department of Levelling Up, Housing and Communities (DLUHC), calling for urgent action to fix the social care funding crisis. 17 Nov 2023 View Sarah Dyke calls for two-month cancer treatment guarantee The Liberal Democrats have called for a new legal right for cancer patients to start treatment within 62 days of an urgent referral. 18 Oct 2023 View Liberal Democrat Success in Castle Cary The Somerset Liberal Democrats are delighted to have gained a seat on Somerset Council in Castle Cary after the by-election on Thursday 10th August. This increases their total councillors on Somerset Council to 62 and a majority of 14. 11 Aug 2023 View Sarah Dyke calls on Chancellor to scrap ‘punitive’ cider tax Newly elected Liberal Democrat MP for Somerton and Frome Sarah Dyke has written to the Chancellor calling on him to scrap the ‘punitive’ cider tax set to come into force next week. 1 Aug 2023 View 1 2 2 Includes stories published while Sarah Dyke was Member of Parliament for Somerton and Frome. The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU.
